# mgc_container_registry_user (Resource)

Provisions the authenticated caller as a Container Registry user. The identity is resolved automatically from the API Key/Token.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "mgc_container_registry_user" "user" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Timestamp when the user was created
- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the container registry user
- `username` (String) Username assigned to the container registry user
